title: Netherite Stone / Bedrock
description: Replaces the Textures from Stones and Ores with the Netherite block texture
body:
With complicated Math and the Bedrock patterns or Block rotation, Coordinates can be figured out wich on many Multiplayer Servers like Donut Smp Bases or Stashes can be found, with our texturepack all leakable blocks gets changed by netherite blocks

Supported Blocks

- Andesite
- Bedrock
- Calcite
- Cobblestone
- Deepslate
- Diorite
- Granite
- Gravel
- Stone
- Tuff

MORE SOON
